text: Stepping through this clean, modern space, I’m enveloped by a sense of anticipation. The glass doors mark a threshold into an environment dedicated to research and development. Once inside, surrounded by vibrant colors, playful textures, and words about innovation, I sense the hum of intellectual curiosity. I feel engaged and alert, as if I am here not just to observe but to contribute—my thoughts are drawn forward by the promise of new ideas and collaboration.
